claude_cli.label: Claude CLI / Subscription
claude_cli.notes: Use local Claude CLI subscription/session for pane operators. No ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is required for this path.

anthropic_api.label: Anthropic API / SDK
anthropic_api.notes: Only enable this for Anthropic API/SDK calls; Claude CLI subscription is configured separately.

codex_cli.label: Codex CLI
codex_cli.notes: Use the local codex CLI session/subscription for repo/code architecture analysis, implementation review, and coding-heavy premium reasoning. No OpenAI API key is required here.

deepseek.label: DeepSeek
deepseek.notes: Use as a low-cost cloud reasoner/fallback for research synthesis and critique.

gemini_antigravity.label: Gemini Antigravity / OAuth
gemini_antigravity.notes: Use local Antigravity/agy OAuth session for Gemini operators. No GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY is required for this path.

google_api.label: Google AI API / Gemini API
google_api.notes: Only enable this for direct Google AI API calls; Antigravity/OAuth is configured separately.

thunderomlx.label: ThunderOMLX local
thunderomlx.notes: Default local preprocessing engine for knowledge extraction; embeddings stay unchanged.

transcript_cleanup.label: Transcript 清洗/切分
transcript_cleanup.notes: 默认本地，避免大段 transcript 进云端。

entity_topic_tagging.label: 实体/主题标签
entity_topic_tagging.notes: 批量低成本任务，默认本地。

cluster_ranking.label: 热点聚类/排序
cluster_ranking.notes: 普通 cluster 本地；高分/冲突 cluster 可升云。

trend_judgement.label: 趋势研判
trend_judgement.notes: 需要高级模型做跨源判断。

repo_technical_analysis.label: GitHub 技术解剖
repo_technical_analysis.notes: 代码/系统设计类优先 Codex CLI。

final_report.label: 最终报告写作
final_report.notes: 报告表达和最终判断默认高级模型。

verification.label: 证据绑定复核
verification.notes: 常规本地，重大结论或失败复核走云端。
